en: Here we go. All right, open. Hmm, this looks new. You think it's safe?
ko: 자, 간다. 좋아, 벌려. 음, 이거 새로운 건데. 안전할까?

en: What is it? Okay, caution. There is a dangerous smell, people.
ko: 이게 뭐야? 좋아, 주의. 위험한 냄새가 나, 여러분.

en: Hold on, what is that? This is disgust.
She basically keeps Riley from being poisoned, physically and socially.
ko: 까칠이는 기본적으로 Riley가 신체적으로나 사회적으로 중독되지 않게 지켜줘.

en: That is not brightly colored or shaped like a dinosaur. Hold on, guys.
ko: 저건 밝은 색도 아니고 공룡 모양도 아니야. 잠깐, 얘들아.

en: Well, I just saved our lives. Yeah, you're welcome.
ko: 자, 방금 우리 목숨을 구했어. 응, 천만에.

en: Riley, if you don't eat your dinner, you're not gonna get any dessert.
ko: Riley, 저녁 안 먹으면 디저트 없어.

en: Wait, did he just say we couldn't have dessert? That's anger.
ko: 잠깐, 방금 디저트 못 먹는다고 했어? 이쪽은 버럭이야.

en: He cares very deeply about things being fair.
ko: 버럭이는 공평한 걸 엄청 중요하게 생각해.

en: So that's how you want to play it, old man? No dessert? Oh, sure.
ko: 그렇게 나오겠다 이거지, 아저씨? 디저트 없다고? 아, 그래.

en: We'll eat our dinner right after you eat this!
ko: 당신이 이걸 먹으면 우리도 저녁 먹을게!

en: Riley, here comes an airplane. Ah!
Oh, airplane. We got an airplane, everybody.
